scripts.start: source backend/venv/bin/activate && concurrently --kill-others --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "bgGreen.bold,bgBlue.bold" "cd backend && uvicorn app.main:app --reload" "cd frontend && npm start -- -c"
scripts.test: source backend/venv/bin/activate && cd backend && pytest && cd ../frontend && npm test
scripts.install: source backend/venv/bin/activate && pip install -r backend/requirements.txt && cd frontend && npm install
